queries.question: List both gate agents who speak Spanish and pilots who also speak Spanish.
queries.sql:
SELECT Staff.FullName
FROM Staff JOIN Languages ON Staff.languageID = Languages.id
WHERE (Staff.role = "Gate Agent" OR Staff.role = "Pilot") AND Languages.language = "Spanish"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?staff a :Staff .
  ?languages a :Languages .
  ?staff p:hasLanguages ?languages .
  ?staff p:name ?fullname .
  ?staff p:role ?role_w .
  ?staff p:role ?role_w2 .
  ?languages p:language ?language_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?role_w) = "Gate Agent" || STR(?role_w2) = "Pilot")) && STR(?language_w) = "Spanish"))
}

queries.question: Show all gate agents and also show all pilots who can speak Spanish.
queries.sql:
SELECT Staff.FullName
FROM Staff JOIN Languages ON Staff.languageID = Languages.id
WHERE Staff.role = "Gate Agent" OR Staff.role = "Pilot" AND Languages.language = "Spanish"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?staff a :Staff .
  ?languages a :Languages .
  ?staff p:hasLanguages ?languages .
  ?staff p:name ?fullname .
  ?staff p:role ?role_w .
  ?staff p:role ?role_w2 .
  ?languages p:language ?language_w .
  FILTER((STR(?role_w) = "Gate Agent" || (STR(?role_w2) = "Pilot" && STR(?language_w) = "Spanish")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show all Spanish-speaking gate agents and pilots.
